translations.- **Packaging Form:** Integrate project:
- **Packaging Form:** Integrate project management tools to fetch ticket numbers and GitHub to retrieve open Pull Requests.

- **Package Records:** Show packaging history, current task progress, and allow clicking to get download links by fetching Firebase App Distribution links and related information.

- **Runner Status:** Display the status of the Self-hosted Runner.

- **Slack build progress notifications.**

- Support Mobile Version.

- Support restricting usage to accounts within the organization team.

- Settings.gs: Some common settings and lib initialization.

- GitHub.gs: Wrapper for GitHub API operations.

- Slack.gs: Wrapper for Slack API operations.

- Firebase.gs: Firebase — Wrapper for App Distribution API operations.

translations.- Remove the line `template.tasks = Stub:
- Remove the line `template.tasks = Stubable.fetchStubAsanaTasks();` which mocks the Asana connection.  
  If you want to connect to Asana/Jira, you can directly ask ChatGPT to help generate the integration method.

- `template.prs = iOSGitHub.fetchOpenPRs();` actually calls the GitHub API to fetch the list of opened PRs and can be kept as needed.

translations.- appsscript.json: Metadata configuratio:
- appsscript.json: Metadata configuration file for the GAS system  
  **The key point is the "oauthScopes" variable, which declares the external permissions this Script will use.**

- Entrypoint.gs: Define the doGet() entry point
translations.- ✅ Free, [almost no limits under normal:
- ✅ Free, [almost no limits under normal use](https://developers.google.com/apps-script/guides/services/quotas?hl=zh-tw){:target="_blank"}

- ✅ Functions as a Service means no need to set up or maintain your own server

- ✅ Permission control integrates with Google Workspace, allowing access only to Google accounts within the organization

- ✅ Seamless integration with Google ecosystem services (e.g. Firebase, GA, etc.) and data (no need to handle OAuth yourself)

- ✅ Programming language uses JavaScript, easy to learn (V8 Runtime supports ES6+)

- ✅ Fast writing, fast deployment, fast usage

- ✅ Stable and long-lasting service (launched over 16 years ago)

- **✅ AI Can Help! Tested Using ChatGPT for Development Assistance, Achieving Up to 95% Accuracy**
translations.- ❌ Built-in version control is problema:
- ❌ Built-in version control is problematic

- ❌ No built-in support for file storage, data storage, or key/certificate management

- ❌ Web App cannot achieve a 100% responsive web design (RWD) experience

- ❌ The project can only be linked to a personal account, not an organization

- ❌ Although Google continues development and maintenance, overall feature updates are slow

- ❌ Network request `UrlFetchApp` does not support setting User-Agent

- ❌ Web App `doGet` / `doPost` does not support retrieving Headers information

- ❌ FaaS [Cold Start Issue](https://www.cloudflare.com/zh-tw/learning/serverless/what-is-serverless/){:target="_blank"}

- ❌ **Does not support simultaneous multi-developer collaboration**  
  However, this has little impact on the Web App, at most causing a few extra seconds delay when loading the page.
translations.0 狀態、0 資料庫， **單純為中繼交換站** ，整合顯示各個 API 資料: 0 state, 0 database, **purely a relay exchange station**, integrating and displaying data from various APIs (e.g. Asana/Jira/GitHub) and forwarding form requests to GitHub Actions.

translations.Firebase.gs: Firebase — App Distribution: Firebase.gs: Firebase — Wrapper for App Distribution API operations.
translations.GAS Web App 串接 GitHub, Slack, Firebase 或: GAS Web App Integrates GitHub, Slack, Firebase, or Asana/Jira APIs to Build a Relay Station, Providing a Cross-Team Shared Packaging Tool Platform
translations.GAS Web App 打包工具平台會串 GitHub API 取得 GitHu: The GAS Web App packaging tool platform connects to the GitHub API to get GitHub Actions run records. We directly use the Job Run ID provided by the API to query the Firebase App Distribution API. If the Release Notes contain a version with `*ID: XXX*`, the corresponding packaging record can be found.
translations.GitHub -> 帳號 -> Settings -> Developer Se: GitHub -> Account -> Settings -> Developer Settings -> Fine-grained personal access tokens or Personal access tokens (classic).
translations.GitHub Actions `workflow_dispatch` 手動表單觸:
GitHub Actions `workflow_dispatch` manual trigger events provide a simple form for users to start builds. However, this is unfriendly for non-engineers who may not understand: what is a branch? Should fields be filled? How to know when the build is done? How to download it once ready? …etc.

There is also a permission control issue. To let other team members use GitHub Actions for builds, you have to add their accounts to the repo. **This is insecure and unreasonable from a security perspective**, as they get access to the entire source code just to operate the build form.
translations.GitHub.gs: GitHub API 操作封裝。\n: GitHub.gs: Wrapper for GitHub API operations.
translations.Google Apps Script 平台並不能很好的支援多人或甚至多開視窗開發: The Google Apps Script platform does not support multiple users or multiple editing windows well. A pitfall I encountered was accidentally opening two editor windows; after editing in window A, I later edited in window B, causing all changes to be overwritten by B’s older version. Therefore, **it is recommended that only one person edits the Script in one window at a time**.
translations.Google Apps Script 是我們的老夥伴，之前做過很多 RPA 專案: Google Apps Script has been our longtime partner. We have used it in many RPA projects to schedule and trigger tasks, such as: "[Crashlytics + Google Analytics Auto Query for App Crash-Free Users Rate](../793cb8f89b72/)" and "[Using Google Apps Script to Automate Daily Data Report RPA](../f6713ba3fee3/)". This time, I recalled it again; GAS has a feature to deploy as a Web (App) to serve directly as a web service.

If the content helps you or improves your team's work efficiency and product quality, please consider buying me a coffee. translations.`Required input ‘SLACK_USER_ID’ not prov: `Required input ‘SLACK_USER_ID’ not provided` *: The SLACK_USER_ID field is required in GitHub Actions but was not provided. This may be due to Slack configuration failure or the current User Email not matching any Slack UID.*
translations.```yaml\n# Workflow(Action) 名稱\nname: CD:
```yaml
# Workflow(Action) name
name: CD-Deploy-Form

# Actions Log title
run-name: "[CD-Deploy-Form] ${{ github.ref }}"

# Cancel any running job in the same concurrency group if a new one starts
# For example, if the same branch's build job is triggered repeatedly, cancel the previous one
concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

# Trigger events
on:
  # Manual form trigger
  workflow_dispatch:
    # Form input fields
    inputs:
      # App version number
      VERSION_NUMBER:
        description: 'Version Number of the app (e.g., 1.0.0). Auto-detect from the Xcode project if left blank.'
        required: false
        type: string
      # App build number
      BUILD_NUMBER:
        description: 'Build number of the app (e.g., 1). Will use a timestamp if left blank.'
        required: false
        type: string
      # App release note
      RELEASE_NOTE:
        description: 'Release notes of the deployment.'
        required: false
        type: string
      # Slack User ID of the triggerer
      SLACK_USER_ID:
        description: 'Slack user id.'
        required: true
        type: string
      # Email of the triggerer
      AUTHOR:
        description: 'Trigger author email.'
        required: true
        type: string
        
# Job tasks
jobs:
  # Send Slack message when starting build
  # Job ID
  start-message:
    # Run this small job on GitHub Hosted Runner, low usage
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    # Set max timeout to avoid endless waiting in abnormal cases
    # Normally should not exceed 5 minutes
    timeout-minutes: 5

    # Job steps
    steps:
      - name: Post a Start Slack Message
        id: slack
        uses: slackapi/slack-github-action@v2.0.0
        with:
          method: chat.postMessage
          token: ${{ secrets.SLACK_BOT_TOKEN }}
          payload: |
            channel: ${{ inputs.SLACK_USER_ID }}
            text: "Build request received.\nID: <${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}|${{ github.run_id }}>\nBranch: ${{ github.ref_name }}\ncc'ed <@${{ inputs.SLACK_USER_ID }}>"
    # Job output for following jobs
    # ts = Slack message ID, so later notifications can reply in the same thread
    outputs:
      ts: ${{ steps.slack.outputs.ts }}

  deploy:
    # Jobs run concurrently by default, use needs to wait for start-message to finish before running
    # Execute build and deploy task
    needs: start-message
    uses: ./.github/workflows/CD-Deploy.yml
    secrets: inherit
    with:
      VERSION_NUMBER: ${{ inputs.VERSION_NUMBER }}
      BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ inputs.BUILD_NUMBER }}
      RELEASE_NOTE: ${{ inputs.RELEASE_NOTE }}
      AUTHOR: ${{ inputs.AUTHOR }}

  # Success message for build and deploy task
  end-message-success:
    needs: [start-message, deploy]
    if: ${{ needs.deploy.result == 'success' }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 5
    steps:
      - name: Post a Success Slack Message
        uses: slackapi/slack-github-action@v2.0.0
        with:
          method: chat.postMessage
          token: ${{ secrets.SLACK_BOT_TOKEN }}
          payload: |
            channel: ${{ inputs.SLACK_USER_ID }}
            thread_ts: "${{ needs.start-message.outputs.ts }}"
            text: "✅ Build and deploy succeeded.\n\ncc'ed <@${{ inputs.SLACK_USER_ID }}>"

  # Failure message for build and deploy task
  end-message-failure:
    needs: [deploy, start-message]
    if: ${{ needs.deploy.result == 'failure' }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 5
    steps:
      - name: Post a Failure Slack Message
        uses: slackapi/slack-github-action@v2.0.0
        with:
          method: chat.postMessage
          token: ${{ secrets.SLACK_BOT_TOKEN }}
          payload: |
            channel: ${{ inputs.SLACK_USER_ID }}
            thread_ts: "${{ needs.start-message.outputs.ts }}"
            text: "❌ Build and deploy failed, please check the execution status or try again later.\n\ncc'ed <@${{ inputs.SLACK_USER_ID }}>"

  # Cancelled message for build and deploy task
  end-message-cancelled:
    needs: [deploy, start-message]
    if: ${{ needs.deploy.result == 'cancelled' }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 5
    steps:
      - name: Post a Cancelled Slack Message
        uses: slackapi/slack-github-action@v2.0.0
        with:
          method: chat.postMessage
          token: ${{ secrets.SLACK_BOT_TOKEN }}
          payload: |
            channel: ${{ inputs.SLACK_USER_ID }}
            thread_ts: "${{ needs.start-message.outputs.ts }}"
            text: ":black_square_for_stop: Build and deploy cancelled.\n\ncc'ed <@${{ inputs.SLACK_USER_ID }}>"
```

**The key point is the "oauthScopes" variable, which declares the external permissions this Script will use.**
translations.⚠️所有程式碼的變動都需要更新部署才會生效。\n\n: ⚠️ All code changes require redeployment to take effect.
translations.✅ Functions as a Service 方法即服務，不需自行架設維護伺: ✅ Functions as a Service means no need to set up or maintain your own server
translations.✅ 快速撰寫、快速上線、快速使用\n: ✅ Fast writing, fast deployment, fast usage
translations.✅ 服務穩定、長久 (已推出超過 16 年)\n: ✅ Stable and long-lasting service (launched over 16 years ago)
translations.✅ 權限控管同 Google Workspace，可設定僅限組織內 Google: ✅ Permission control integrates with Google Workspace, allowing access only to Google accounts within the organization
translations.✅ 無痛整合 Google 生態系相關服務(e.g. Firebase, GA…: ✅ Seamless integration with Google ecosystem services (e.g. Firebase, GA, etc.) and data (no need to handle OAuth yourself)
translations.✅ 程式語言使用 JavaScript 易上手 (V8 Runtime 支援 E: ✅ Programming language uses JavaScript, easy to learn (V8 Runtime supports ES6+)
translations.❌ **不支援多人同時開發**\n但在 Web App 影響不大，頂多要多等幾秒:
❌ **Does not support simultaneous multi-developer collaboration**  
However, this has little impact on the Web App, at most causing a few extra seconds delay when loading the page.
translations.❌ Web App `doGet` / `doPost` 不支援取得 Heade: ❌ Web App `doGet` / `doPost` does not support retrieving Headers information
translations.❌ Web App 無法做到 100% 體驗的 RWD\n: ❌ Web App cannot achieve 100% responsive web design (RWD) experience
translations.❌ 內建不支援檔案、資料儲存、金鑰/憑證管理\n: ❌ No built-in support for file storage, data storage, or key/certificate management
translations.❌ 專案只能綁在個人帳號而不是組織\n: ❌ The project can only be linked to a personal account, not an organization.
translations.❌ 網路請求 `UrlFetchApp` 不支援設定 User-Agent\n: ❌ Network request `UrlFetchApp` does not support setting User-Agent
translations.❌ 雖然 Google 有持續在開發維護，但整體功能更新緩慢\n: ❌ Although Google continues development and maintenance, overall feature updates are slow

translations.以上是 GAS 本身服務的優缺點，對做打包工具 Web 影響不大；選擇使用此方案: The above are the pros and cons of the GAS service itself, which have little impact on building a packaging tool web app. Compared to a Slack-based solution, this approach is faster, lighter, and easier to hand over and learn. **The downside is that the team needs to know the tool’s URL and how to use it, and due to GAS’s limited library functions** (e.g., no built-in encryption algorithms), it can basically only serve as a pure relay platform. For example, for submission requests, it can only forward the approval request to GitHub Actions.

translations.初期也嘗試過用 FaaS 服務串接 Slack API，例如 Cloud Fun: Initially, we also tried using FaaS services to connect with the Slack API, such as Cloud Functions. However, Slack API requires the connected service to respond within 3 seconds; otherwise, it is considered a failure. FaaS suffers from the [cold start issue](https://www.cloudflare.com/zh-tw/learning/serverless/what-is-serverless/){:target="_blank"}, where the service goes to sleep after a period of inactivity and takes longer to respond (≥ 5 seconds) when called again. This causes the Slack packaging form to be unstable and often results in Timeout Errors.

translations.前篇「 [**CI/CD 實戰指南（三）：使用 GitHub Actions 實: In the previous article "[**CI/CD Practical Guide (Part 3): Implementing iOS App CI and CD Workflows with GitHub Actions**](../4b001d2e8440/)," we completed the foundational CI/CD setup for the iOS app project. Now, CI can automatically run tests and CD can handle packaging and deployment. However, in real product development workflows, **packaging and deployment are mostly done to deliver builds to other functional teams** for QA (Quality Assurance) testing. At this point, the CD process is no longer limited to the engineering side; it may involve QA, PM, design (Design QA), or even the boss wanting to try it out first.

translations.因此 **我們需要一個中繼站打包平台，用來服務其他職能使用者** ，整合 Asa: Therefore, **we need an intermediary packaging platform to serve other functional users**, integrating Asana/Jira task tickets so that users can directly package the app using the task ticket and view the progress and download the packaging results on it.

translations.如同前述，所有改動要生效都要更新部署；這在開發階段非常麻煩，因此在開發階段我們可: As mentioned earlier, all changes require redeployment to take effect; this is inconvenient during development. Therefore, we can use a "test deployment" during development to quickly verify if the changes are correct.
translations.如果有在 Firebase App Distribution Release N: If the corresponding Job Run Id is found in the Firebase App Distribution Release Notes, the download information will be displayed directly, and clicking the download button will take you straight to the download page.
translations.如果認為這樣不夠安全可以自己再加入密碼驗證或只有特殊帳號可以使用。\n\n: If you think this is not secure enough, you can add password verification or restrict access to specific accounts.

translations.完成部署後的「網頁應用程式」網址，就是你的 Web App 打包工具網址，可以分: The URL of the "Web App" after deployment is your Web App packaging tool URL, which you can share with your team members. (The URL might look ugly, so you can use a URL shortening service to tidy it up. **Updating the deployment content will not change the URL**.)
translations.寫了一個很陽春的 類-MVC 架構，如要調整或不知道功能問 AI 都能得到準確答: I wrote a very simple class-based MVC architecture. If you need adjustments or don’t understand a feature, you can ask AI for accurate answers.
translations.專案右上角「部署」 → 「新增部署作業」 → 類型「網頁應用程式」:\n\n: In the top right corner of the project, click "Deploy" → "New deployment" → select type "Web app":
translations.已封鎖存取權「XXX」未完成 Google 驗證程序\n\n: Access to "XXX" blocked due to incomplete Google verification process
translations.延續我們「中繼站」角色的精神，這邊提供幾個快速串接的 CheatSheet：\n: Continuing the spirit of our "relay station" role, here are some quick integration CheatSheets:
translations.建議使用 Fine-grained personal access tokens: It is recommended to use Fine-grained personal access tokens for better security (but they have an expiration).
translations.感謝您的耐心閱讀與參與，CI/CD 從 0 到 1 系列文章到此告一段落；希望能: Thank you for your patience and participation. The CI/CD from 0 to 1 series ends here; I hope it helps you and your team build a solid CI/CD workflow to improve efficiency and product stability. If you have any implementation questions, feel free to leave a comment. These four articles took about 14+ days to write. **If you found them helpful, please follow me on Medium and share with your friends and colleagues.**
translations.我 `統一都用你的帳號身分執行腳本。`\n: I `always run the script using your account identity.`
translations.我們嘗試過讓 Slack 擔任打包平台，自行開發後端服務並架設在 GCP 上，與: We tried using Slack as the packaging platform by developing our own backend service hosted on GCP. It integrated with Slack API and Asana API, then forwarded forms submitted via Slack to GitHub API to trigger subsequent GitHub Actions. The experience was very smooth and unified within the team's collaboration tools, making it easy to use. However, **the downside was the high development and maintenance costs**. Since the backend was built with Ktor, app engineers had to handle both backend development and Google service OAuth integration. Some features, like submission for review, had to be implemented here, making it complex. If new team members didn't properly take over this part, it became nearly impossible to maintain. Additionally, there was a monthly $15 USD GCP server fee.
translations.我們的打包平台是沒有資料庫的，純做 API 中繼站；所以實際上是我們在 [**G: Our packaging platform has no database and serves purely as an API relay station; so in practice, when we run the packaging job in [**GitHub Actions CD-Deploy.yml**](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/github-actions-ci-cd-demo/actions/workflows/CD-Deploy.yml){:target="_blank"}, we include the Job Run ID in the Release Note (of course, it can also be included in the Build Number):
translations.我們直接使用 Bootstrap CDN，不然要自己弄 CSS 樣式太麻煩了，B: We directly use the Bootstrap CDN, otherwise managing CSS styles ourselves would be too troublesome. Asking AI how to combine and use Bootstrap is also more accurate and convenient.
translations.所有人 `不需要登入 Google 帳號、所有人都可以公開存取。`\n: Everyone `does not need to sign in with a Google account, and everyone can access it publicly.`
translations.所有已登入 Google 帳號的使用者 `已登入的 Google 帳號使用者都可:
All signed-in Google account users  
`All signed-in Google account users can access.`
translations.支援限制組織團隊內帳號使用\n: Support restricting usage to accounts within the organization team
translations.最後一個小功能是串接 Firebase App Distribution 直接取: The last small feature is integrating Firebase App Distribution to directly get download info and links, making it easy to open the packaging platform tool on a mobile device and click to download and install.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.未驗證警告視窗，點擊「進階」展開 → 點擊 前往「XXX」(不安全)\n: Unverified warning window, click "Advanced" to expand → click Proceed to "XXX" (unsafe)
translations.為了串接 Slack 通知，我們首先要回到 Repo → GitHub Acti: To integrate Slack notifications, we first need to go back to the Repo → GitHub Actions and add a notification container Action that wraps the package build Action Workflow.
translations.移除 `template.tasks = Stubable.fetchStubA:
Remove the line `template.tasks = Stubable.fetchStubAsanaTasks();` which mocks the Asana connection.  
If you want to connect to Asana/Jira, you can directly ask ChatGPT to help generate the integration method.
translations.至此你已經把範例都改成您的實際可用的打包工具，剩下的客製化功能、更多第三方 AP: By now, you have adapted the examples into your actual usable packaging tool. Remaining custom features, additional third-party API integrations, and more forms can be extended on your own (discuss with ChatGPT).
translations.複製完長得會跟範例專案一模一樣。\n\n: After copying, it will look exactly the same as the sample project.
translations.記得到 Repo → Secrets 新增對應的 `SLACK_BOT_TOKE: Remember to add the corresponding `SLACK_BOT_TOKEN` in Repo → Secrets and input the Slack Bot App Token value.
translations.註:「這個應用程式是由 Google Apps Script 的使用者建立」這個: Note: The "This app was created by a Google Apps Script user" message cannot be hidden automatically.
translations.註：我 Runner 沒開…所以是離線中。\n\n: Note: My Runner is off... so it is offline.

translations.這個 Action 只是個容器，串接 Slack 通知，實際是復用 [上一篇文章: This Action is just a container that connects Slack notifications, actually reusing the [CD-Deploy.yml](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/github-actions-ci-cd-demo/blob/main/.github/workflows/CD-Deploy.yml){:target="_blank"} Action written in the [previous article](../4b001d2e8440/).
translations.這樣 Firebase App Distribution Release Not: This way, the Firebase App Distribution Release Notes will include the Job Run ID.
translations.這當然是最優解，如果團隊有 Web、後端人力，直接與現有系統整合是最好也最安全的: This is obviously the optimal solution. If the team has web or backend developers, directly integrating with existing systems is the best and safest approach.
translations.這邊已經把整個平台架構開源了，大家可以依照自己團隊的需求基於這個版本再客製化即可: The entire platform architecture has been open-sourced here. Everyone can customize this version according to their team's needs.
translations.這邊要注意程式碼變動儲存完不會直接變動到 Web App 上，所以發現重整沒效果: Note that saving code changes does not immediately update the Web App, so if refreshing has no effect, this is the reason; **you need to go to "Deploy" → "Manage Deployments" → "Edit" → create a new version → click "Deploy" → "Done"**.
translations.選擇「目標對象」 → 測試 點擊「發布應用程式」→ 完成。\n\n: Select "Target Audience" → Test, click "Deploy as web app" → Done.
translations.首次點擊 Web App 網址，需要先同意授權。\n\n: The first time you click the Web App URL, you need to grant authorization.
translations.點擊「專案編號」 → 展開左側欄 → 「API 和服務」→ 「OAuth 同意畫: Click "Project Number" → expand the left sidebar → "APIs & Services" → "OAuth consent screen"
translations.️️⚠️所有程式碼的變動都需要更新部署才會生效。\n\n: ️️⚠️All code changes require redeployment to take effect.
